text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Chunichi Shimbun Hai is here. As Nice Nature
patiently awaits the start of the race in her
waiting room, she is visited by Mejiro McQueen
and Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned for Nice Nature after noticing her
screaming into the tree stump at school, they've
come to check on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature assures them that she is fully
recovered and confidently makes her way to the
race.
